title: A new life a new soul / our life which is hidden w/ Christ in God/ the destruction of his flesh for the preservation of his soul? a life giving spirit...
author: joshualinog
excerpt: Do we get a new soul ? is our soul/spirit/ glory (qavod) ontologically transformed by union w/ Messiah?
body:
Do we get a new soul ? is our soul/spirit/ glory (qavod) ontologically transformed by union w/ Messiah?

- circa destruction of flesh for preservation of soul?
